name: Jeremy Reynard
title: Strategic Operations Leader
summary: 10+ years leading BizOps, People Ops, and Analytics at high-growth startups and global companies (LinkedIn, Disney+, WeWork, Matter Labs). Builds 0→1 operations and scales them 10x. Partners with executive leadership to create operating rhythms, enable data-driven decisions, and drive alignment during rapid scale. Cross-functional program executor across People, Finance, Legal, and Data. Experienced managing global teams across NAMER, LATAM, EMEA, and APAC.
skills: Cross-functional program management — built and ran People/Legal/Finance workstreams at Matter Labs (150+ person org, 30+ countries)
Operating cadence design — codified annual business rhythms (OKRs, QBRs, board prep) from scratch at Matter Labs
Strategic analytics — automated Disney+ exec reporting (130M+ subs), reducing time-to-insight 80%, saving 30 hrs/wk
High-stakes launch execution — led ops for Matter Labs token launch, distributing ~$1B to 300+ stakeholders across People/Legal/Finance
People operations — interim Head of People (10 reports), comp model redesign, ATS migration, 401(k) rollout, exec searches
Cost optimization — $300K+ savings via vendor renegotiations, AI tool rollout, tool consolidation, workflow automation
International growth — built Disney+ analytics team supporting EMEA/LATAM/APAC (~70% of subs), WeWork LATAM expansion (6 countries)
Data-driven decision-making — sized $10M+ partnership at Disney+, defined $20M+ quarterly marketing revenue measurement at WeWork
Change management — AI tool adoption programs, Amplitude rollouts, Slack migrations, expense policy overhauls
Ambiguity navigation — valued a physical remote button for Roku/Disney+ partnership, stepped in as interim IR lead during token launch
Team building and people development — built analytics career ladder at Disney+, coached 3+ individuals to senior promotions
Investor relations — managed investor communications and cap table during high-scrutiny token launch period
AI workflows — piloting Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini across organizations; driving adoption with SOPs and guardrails

highlights: Strategic partner to COO leading post-merger alignment of People, Finance, and Operations
Standardizing policy and process across ~$15M annual operating budget org
Piloting Claude adoption program across the organization

experience.role: Chief of Staff & Head of BizOps, Office of the COO
highlights: Led ops for public token listing — ~$1B distributed to 300+ stakeholders across People/Legal/Finance
Reduced People-related burn rate 10% through comp redesign and strategic headcount planning
Saved $300K+ in operating costs through vendor renegotiations, AI tools, and workflow automation
Increased on-time delivery of cross-functional initiatives 40% by building structured operating cadence
Served as interim Head of People — managed 10-person org, launched comp model, ATS migration, 401(k)
Filled critical gaps: Investor Relations, cap table management, compliance workstreams

experience.role: Manager, International Analytics → Business Strategy & Analytics Lead
highlights: Reduced time-to-insight 80% by automating executive reporting across 130M+ global subscribers
Enabled $10M+ partnership negotiation via cross-functional LTV and ROI analysis
Supported 10% international subscriber growth by building analytics team for EMEA/LATAM/APAC
Interim Manager, Partner Analytics — optimized 100+ global partnerships
Built analytics career ladder and helped 3+ individuals secure senior promotions
First data hire — built exec reporting (CAC, LTV, ARPU, retention) enabling 10-15% MoM growth
Led Amplitude product analytics rollout for self-service analysis across global subscribers
Reduced CAC 4x QoQ through data-driven marketing optimization
First regional growth analytics lead for LATAM — 6 countries, 11 markets, based in Buenos Aires
Supported $20M+ quarterly marketing revenue measurement by defining core KPIs and building reporting
Increased data-driven decision-making 30% through self-service dashboards and stakeholder education

experience.role: Team Lead, Global Market Research Programs
highlights: Promoted within role; recognized as 2018 Top Cross-Functional Partner out of 4000+ employees
Increased project delivery 33% by centralizing program management and automating workflows
Surveyed 300K+ members for LinkedIn's largest NPS program; supported $20M revenue via 30+ client research projects
Started in Business Leadership Program — rotations in Recruiting (200 SWE interviews/16 hires), Ops, and Sales (165% quota)

education: UCLA, BA Business-Economics, Summa Cum Laude | University of Salamanca & LSE International Program

keyThemes.buildFromZero: Repeatedly built 0→1 functions: first data hire at Luminary, first LATAM analytics lead at WeWork, first international analytics team at Disney+, built BizOps from scratch at Matter Labs
keyThemes.executivePartnership: Track record as right-hand to C-suite: COO at Matter Labs, VP at Disney+, COO at current fractional role. Translates ambiguity into structured execution.
keyThemes.crossFunctionalGlue: Natural connector across People, Legal, Finance, Data, and Ops. Led cross-functional workstreams at every company. Recognized as Top Cross-Functional Partner at LinkedIn.
keyThemes.dataToDecisions: Makes organizations more data-driven: automated reporting, built dashboards, sized opportunities, defined KPIs. Not just analytics — turns data into decisions and action.
keyThemes.globalExperience: Led teams and initiatives across NAMER, LATAM, EMEA, APAC. Lived and worked in Buenos Aires. Advanced Spanish. Comfortable with distributed, multicultural teams.
keyThemes.operationalScale: Manages complexity at scale: 130M+ subscribers at Disney+, $1B token distribution at Matter Labs, 6-country expansion at WeWork, 300K+ member surveys at LinkedIn.
